overview: Telemedicine practice specializing in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy for menopause and andropause. Physicians conduct remote consultations via Skype, Google Hangouts, or FaceTime to create individualized treatment plans.
highlights: Telemedicine consultations via Skype, Google Hangouts, or FaceTime
targetAudience: Women in menopause and men with low testosterone seeking telemedicine-based hormone optimization.
